info.title: Fenergo Nebula Risk Query
info.description:
**Risk Query API**:


Risk Query API provides endpoints in order to retrieve all configured risk related models and their versions, as well as to perform risk assessment calculations.


**Risk Query API provides**:
  • Risk Assessment Calculation
  • Risk Calculator Scoping Rules retrieval
  • Risk Configuration Collection and Items retrieval
  • Risk Models retrieval
  • Risk Threshold Models retrieval
  • Risk Scoping Rules retrieval

post.description:
This method will calculate the risk and generate a risk assessment based on the options and data defined in the request DTO.

Required permissions:
Following permissions are required: RiskCalculatorAccess

parameters.name: X-TENANT-ID
parameters.description: The UiD of the tenant representing organization

requestBody.description: The Fenergo.Nebula.Risk.Query.Application.Dto.RiskAssessmentDto model defining the risk data for the assessment

500.description: An exception occurred while processing the command

401.description: User is not authorized to perform this request

messages.message: Access denied. Following permissions are required: Permission1, Permission2

410.description: Endpoint marked as deprecated was terminated. This response will be present only if the endpoint was marked as deprecated and has reached the sunset date. During the deprecation period, the API will include additional 'sunset' and 'deprecation' headers.

messages.message: This endpoint is obsolete and was terminated on yyyy-MM-dd

post.summary: Get the Risk Calculator Options for a given Scope
post.description:
This method will query which risk calculator options are a match for the given scope parameters, and return a list of all options that match, including those that are flagged as Always Return.

Required permissions:
At least one of the following permissions is required: RiskConfigurationAccess, RiskCalculatorAccess

parameters.name: X-TENANT-ID
parameters.description: The UiD of the tenant representing organization
